label: auth
sublabel: togo base auth: JWT + RBAC + multi-guard, Supabase/GoTrue first-class, OAuth/Firebase/WorkOS as plugins

label: auth-dev
sublabel: Developer login for togo auth (dev-only)

label: auth-firebase
sublabel: Firebase Authentication driver for togo auth

label: auth-oauth
sublabel: OAuth2 social login for togo auth

label: auth-session-redis
sublabel: Redis session store for togo auth

label: auth-workos
sublabel: WorkOS SSO/SAML driver for togo auth

label: cache
sublabel: togo cache provider plugin

label: cache-redis
sublabel: Redis driver for togo cache

label: claude-togo
sublabel: Official ToGO plugin for Claude Code — scaffold & drive togo apps with AI (commands, agents, hooks + auto-connected MCP).

label: dashboard
sublabel: togo dashboard + auth UI (depends on auth)

label: db-supabase
sublabel: Postgres/Supabase driver for togo ORM

label: faker
sublabel: togo faker: fake data for factories/seeders

label: i18n
sublabel: togo i18n provider plugin

label: log
sublabel: togo logging: levels, text/json, file output

label: mail
sublabel: togo mail: SMTP + driver plugins (SES/Resend)

label: mail-resend
sublabel: Resend driver for togo mail

label: mcp-web
sublabel: Public MCP server for togo — docs, plugins, and plugin submission for agents (mcp.to-go.dev).

label: notifications
sublabel: togo notifications: channels (mail/broadcast/db) + push plugins

label: notifications-onesignal
sublabel: OneSignal push channel for togo notifications

label: orm
sublabel: togo ORM: driver-agnostic query builder (SQLi-validated)

label: plugin-auth-supabase
sublabel: togo plugin: Supabase (GoTrue) JWT auth — /auth/me + bearer middleware

label: queue
sublabel: togo queue provider plugin

label: realtime
sublabel: togo realtime provider plugin

label: realtime-ws
sublabel: WebSocket realtime transport for togo

label: search
sublabel: togo search: ParadeDB default + ES/OpenSearch plugins

label: search-elasticsearch
sublabel: Elasticsearch/OpenSearch driver for togo search

label: seo
sublabel: togo SEO/AEO plugin — sitemap, robots, llms.txt, meta/OG/JSON-LD + IndexNow / Google Analytics / Search Console / Bing providers.

label: storage
sublabel: togo storage provider plugin

label: storage-supabase
sublabel: Supabase Storage driver for togo

label: supabase
sublabel: togo Supabase integration: custom image (ParadeDB/pgvector/pg_partman) + stack

label: testing
sublabel: togo test harness (HTTP + assertions + sqlite)

label: validation
sublabel: togo request validation (Laravel-style rules)

label: worker
sublabel: togo worker: supervised multi-threaded worker pools

label: togo
sublabel: Master orchestrator for a togo app — routes work to the right specialist, owns architecture and the generate→migrate→serve sequence, verifies integration across Go API and React UI before reporting done.

label: togo-architect
sublabel: Architecture guide for togo apps — microkernel/plugin design, generator-first workflow, codegen pipeline order, and API-first (GraphQL + REST) decisions. Use for design questions and when deciding resource vs plugin.

label: togo-backend
sublabel: Backend specialist for this togo app — Go, chi, Huma (REST/OpenAPI), gqlgen (GraphQL), sqlc, Atlas, pgx/Postgres. Use for API endpoints, resolvers, queries, migrations.

label: togo-data
sublabel: Data specialist for togo — sqlc typed queries, Atlas schema/migrations, query performance, seeders/factories, and analytics over Postgres/togo-postgres (pgvector, FTS). Use for data modeling and DB performance.

label: togo-db
sublabel: Database specialist for a togo app — Atlas schema/migrations (HCL), sqlc typed queries, seeders, and the DB driver registry (Postgres/SQLite/MySQL/Mongo). Use for schema, queries, and data.

label: togo-devops
sublabel: DevOps for a togo app — togo deploy (rsync/ssh), infra, Docker, CI/CD, and environment config. Use for shipping the single binary + frontend to a server and wiring pipelines.

label: togo-frontend
sublabel: Frontend specialist for a togo app — React, TanStack Router/Query or Next.js App Router, Vite, the generated typed API client + hooks, and pages. Use for UI, data fetching, and routes.

label: togo-plugin-architect
sublabel: Plugin architect for togo — the microkernel contract (Register/Boot, priority, hooks), capability boundaries, and the base→providers model (e.g. auth → auth-dev/auth-firebase). Use for designing plugins and their interfaces.

label: togo-plugin-author
sublabel: Author togo capability plugins — the microkernel Plugin contract (Priority/Register/Boot), CLI/route/schema registration, packaging, and publishing to the marketplace. Use when building or extending a togo plugin.

label: togo-prompt-engineer
sublabel: Prompt/agent engineer for togo — the .claude/ tree (agents, skills, rules, hooks), the MCP wiring, and the claude-togo plugin. Use for authoring or improving AI tooling around a togo app.

label: togo-qa
sublabel: QA for a togo app — Go testing (table-driven, httptest), the generated REST/GraphQL contract, and React UI tests (Vitest/Playwright). Use for test coverage, E2E flows, and regression checks.

label: togo-release-manager
sublabel: Release manager for togo packages — semver, CHANGELOG, goreleaser tags, npm wrapper publishing, and pkg.go.dev. Use for cutting releases and promotion governance.

label: togo-security
sublabel: Security for a togo app — auth/RBAC (JWT, OTP/2FA, sessions), secrets handling, dependency/VAPT audit, and safe plugin installation. Use for threat review, auth flows, and hardening.

label: togo-technical-writer
sublabel: Technical writer for togo — READMEs, docs pages, llms.txt, command/agent reference, and the plugin marketplace copy. Use for clear, accurate, example-first documentation.

label: togo-ui-designer
sublabel: UI/design for togo apps — the @togo-framework/ui kit, semantic theme tokens, dark/light + RTL, and component composition. Use for building/adjusting UI with the kit instead of raw CSS.

label: /togo:deploy
sublabel: Provision infra and deploy the togo app (Terraform).

label: /togo:doctor
sublabel: Check the togo toolchain (Go, Node/npm, sqlc, Atlas) and auto-install what's missing.

label: /togo:generate
sublabel: Run the togo codegen pipeline (sqlc → gqlgen → Atlas → OpenAPI).

label: /togo:logs
sublabel: Tail and explain the running togo app's logs (API + web).

label: /togo:mcp
sublabel: Inspect / wire the togo MCP server (generators + project introspection as tools).

label: /togo:migrate
sublabel: Apply / manage database migrations (Atlas) for the current togo app.

label: /togo:new
sublabel: Scaffold a new togo app (Go API + React UI, one binary). Installs the togo CLI if missing.

label: /togo:new-plugin
sublabel: Scaffold a new togo plugin (microkernel capability) from the plugin template.

label: /togo:plugin
sublabel: Install or scaffold a togo capability plugin (auth, dashboard, cache, queue, …).

label: /togo:resource
sublabel: Generate a togo resource (model + sqlc + Atlas + GraphQL + REST + UI page) and run codegen.

label: /togo:serve
sublabel: Run the togo app (Go API + React UI) locally.

label: /togo:status
sublabel: Show togo project health — toolchain, MCP connectivity, build/generate status, and running services.

label: /togo:team
sublabel: List the togo agent team and what each specialist owns.

label: /togo:test
sublabel: Run the togo app's tests — Go tests and the frontend tests — and report results.
